headline: PPG, PPG Foundation commit $10 million to advance skilled trades education
summary: PITTSBURGH, March 24, 2026--PPG (NYSE:PPG) and the PPG Foundation today announced a commitment to invest $10 million globally through 2030 to support skilled trades initiatives, with a focus on advanced manufacturing and coatings applications.

headline: PPG introduces PPG InsightsNav analytics tool for marine seastock coatings data
summary: PITTSBURGH, March 24, 2026--PPG InsightsNav analytics platform is designed to help shipowners optimize seastock coatings purchasing data for improved strategic planning.
